Interface IBuildSeamlinesParameters3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters to the build seamlines operation.

[Guid("041FAE1F-F36B-4540-A699-7D40A9698E1A")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IBuildSeamlinesParameters3 : IBuildSeamlinesParameters2, IBuildSeamlinesParameters
